props.title: Pricing
props.description: Premium is computed by the Rule Engine on Quote.requestPrice. The pricing engine is not yet wired on the backend, so requests fire-and-forget and the premium does not populate. The fields below stay zero until backend ships the engine.

props.title: Per-plan premium breakdown
props.description: Rows are parsed from estimatedPremium.byPlanJson (opaque JSON string on the quote response, implied shape: [{ planNo, amount, currency }]). Plan name is joined from plans[] by planNo via the data-table cross-array join.

emptyState.title: Pricing not yet computed
emptyState.description: Press Request price to invoke the Rule Engine. Note: the pricing engine is not yet wired on the backend, so the request fires-and-forgets and rows will not populate until the engine ships.

actions.label: Request price
actions.disabledTooltip: Pricing engine not yet wired on backend — request fires-and-forgets to no listener. Button enabled once Rule Engine ships.
